methodologies: Statistical hypothesis testing and ranking (e.g., Autorank)
summary: This batch of papers portrays a senior empirical software engineering researcher with a heavy focus on the methodological rigor of the field itself. A massive portion of their work involves exposing flaws in standard datasets (like SZZ-generated data) and providing high-quality, manually validated datasets and tools (SmartSHARK) to fix these issues. They also frequently publish on correct statistical benchmarking (Autorank) and, more recently, the evaluation of AI/Transformers in software engineering.
